summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; hydrated open non-security PRs are kept as independent review/proof items, validator-identified security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, and unhydrated listed refs are scoped to needs_human because the artifact lacks live state required for target_kind and target_updated_at.
